label: Boxers & Crocs
outfit: boxer shorts and a heavy black leather jacket, bare-legged, feet jammed into too-small bright pink Crocs, clutching a fluffy tortoiseshell cat, in a freezing night

label: Barefoot crawler
outfit: the same boxer shorts and black leather jacket, now completely barefoot, having lost the pink Crocs

label: Dollar-store Batman
outfit: boxer shorts, barefoot with a toe ring, an enchanted trollskin shirt worn under the leather jacket, a hooded black nightgaunt cloak made of demon-wing skin with pointed ear-tips, and fingerless gloves; still no pants
